calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Cheryl Anne Sena, Esq., for Petitioner: Elisa Sciaroni, present, as guardian ad litem for Minors: Aurelie Portia Mathez and Massimo Nicolas Claude Rinaldi Mathez, was sworn and examined.
Petitioner testified that she has full custody of the minors. The minors' father was served with the petition & order to show cause, and a notice & acknowledgment of receipt, signed by the father, was filed with the court.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the Petition for Change of Name of Minor to: Aurelie Portia Sciaroni.
The Court grants the Petition for Change of Name of Minor to: Massimo Nicholas Rinaldi Sciaroni.
Decree signed in open court.
